query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bill_notifications` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `billId` int NOT NULL,
  `daysBeforeDue` int NOT NULL,
  `sentAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `bill_notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `billId` int NOT NULL,
  `daysBeforeDue` int NOT NULL,
  `sentAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `bill_notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
